message:
🐛 Ensure WebSocket auth token on /clusters page connections (#10694)

The presence WebSocket in useActiveUsers.ts was opening connections
without calling appendWsAuthToken(), causing ws_auth_missing errors
on the /clusters page. Also replaced a magic number (30000) with the
existing HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL constant.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
